description: A high-angle photograph shows a long stretch of coastline featuring a sandy beach, the Atlantic Ocean, and dark, layered cliffs. The ocean displays deep blue hues, transitioning to turquoise closer to the shore, with white waves breaking and receding. The beach is a light brown to orange colour, with small figures of people scattered along its length. Towering, dark grey and brown cliffs, exhibiting distinct geological strata, run parallel to the coast, providing a rugged land-sea interface. Sparse, dry vegetation covers the upper plateau of the cliffs, and a winding dirt path is visible on the clifftop in the middle ground. The sky is a clear, bright blue, suggesting a sunny day.
